query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "omniretrieval: unified retrieval across heterogeneous knowledge source" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (f) as it measures the core dependent variable (retrieval performance across heterogeneous languages) and operates within the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster for "unified retrieval across heterogeneous knowledge sources" (specifically cross-lingual retrieval without aligned corpora). Although it focuses on multilingual rather than the specific "OmniRetrieval" framework, it provides the essential empirical baseline and mechanism for handling linguist
